input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.4.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.4.2.2
            TITLE: to obtain approval, submit a rules question which includes:

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.4.2.2: To obtain approval, submit a Rules Question which includes:
IC.4.2.2 To obtain approval, submit a Rules Question which includes:  
• Which ETC system the team is seeking approval to use.   
• The specific ETC rule(s) that the commercial system deviates from.   
• Sufficient technical details of these deviations to determine the acceptability of the 
commercial system.

final_answer: To obtain approval, submit a Rules Question which includes: • Which ETC system the team is seeking approval to use. • The specific ETC rule(s) that the commercial system deviates from. • Sufficient technical details of these deviations to determine the acceptability of the commercial system.
